description: 数学建模竞赛证据标准 - 适用于 HiMCM 等数学建模竞赛

acceptable_source_types: academic journal article with mathematical model

logical_fallacies.name: 未验证的假设
logical_fallacies.description: 关键假设缺乏合理性论证

logical_fallacies.name: 过度拟合
logical_fallacies.description: 模型过于复杂但未论证复杂度与拟合质量的权衡

logical_fallacies.name: 外推错误
logical_fallacies.description: 在模型有效范围外进行预测

fatal_defects.name: 无假设论证
fatal_defects.description: 未列出并论证模型关键假设

fatal_defects.name: 无敏感性分析
fatal_defects.description: 未对关键参数进行敏感性分析

fatal_defects.name: 无模型验证
fatal_defects.description: 未验证模型输出与实际数据的一致性
